title: alchemilla vulgaris subsp. semisecta
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. semisecta, also known as lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. semisecta include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
